propositions: The plan-v2 impact model floors ac_unverifiable at 0.85 whenever the axis is non-none at any grade, so the hard floor is grade-blind and auto-blocks refinement-only findings with the same force as untestable ones.
The binary ac_unverifiable severity grade is replaced with a three-value oracle-kind grade (missing_oracle, broken_oracle, underspecified_oracle) assigned by the pass-2 verifier.

missing_oracle and broken_oracle keep the 0.85 hard floor, while underspecified_oracle maps to an impact contribution of 0.55, below the 0.60 lowest blocking threshold, so it surfaces and is coached but never auto-blocks.
PlanSeverityAttrs.ac_unverifiable becomes a closed Literal grade set so Pydantic strict validation rejects out-of-vocabulary grades at verification-parse time.
enrich_operator_attested clears missing_oracle and underspecified_oracle on attested evidence but never clears broken_oracle, because a factually wrong stated command is not cured by an attestation.
IMPACT_MODEL_VERSION bumps plan-v2 to plan-v3 while the sidecar schema id stays plan_review_result_v2, and legacy plan-v2 records with low/medium/high grades are read as-is via version segmentation.
